message:
fix(tests): Fix summary mode tests and compilation errors

- Add comprehensive summary mode test coverage (18 tests)
- Fix export-priors test with required --out argument
- Fix session ID regex to match actual format (pt-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-xxxx)
- Add missing check_agent_supervision trait method to PreCheckProvider
- Add missing require_human_for_supervised field in test helper

Closes: c7rx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
